export_metadata.note: Rows pulled from the Apps Script comment inbox after batch 2026-06-30-002.

comments.comment_text: Drosin should be established as essentially a High Clade magus level - although Archeon relies on a stack and Drosin needs to use tools, that doesn't mean he isn't an extremely dangerous combatant and certainly the most dangerous person Davian has to actually have a full fight with throughout Book 1 (his things with Caius are brief and interrupted, and he doesn't fight Vorren directly himself, just blocks/supports for Maya and Niall). He ultimately will need Kelyra's help to defeat Drosin, even if the fight is somewhat fair overall

comments.current_heading: Chapter 42 · Kelyra is present but not yet able to simply walk out or solve the fight.
comments.comment_text: Kelyra is chained up and unable to help; it's ultimately her manifestation of a Shroud that lets her break free.

So the thing with Kelyra here is that she should be unable to help specifically because she's restrained and can't manifest a Shroud. It wouldn't make sense for her to just be hanging out no matter her level of injury. Also Serathis would have healed her up (we saw this earlier) so she is physically well
